rows.notes: Top title line in Latin. Handwriting of the surname is unclear (looks like 'Roguembe' or similar). No monetary amounts on this line; label at page head. Column alignment not needed for header.
Clear date line 'a Secundo die mensis Novembris 1743.' Legible Latin; no amounts present.
Clear Latin line 'ad eundem Diem Revolution 1744.' No monetary amounts.
Section heading 'Arrearagia Recepta' (receipts of arrears). Underlined; no monetary amounts. Handwriting clear.
Column heading for currency at top-right ('L S D'). No amounts. Alignment of currency columns established from nearby totals.
Clear entry 'Gwinear'. Numeric columns line up with vertical rules; amount reads 100 pounds, 00 shillings, 00 pence exactly.
rows.english_description: Arrear receipt from the parish of Gwinear.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear receipt from the parish of Gwinear, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description 'Clifton Ferry' legible. Pounds clearly '04'. Pence reads '00'. This is a moderate-confidence decision due to ambiguity in the middle digit.
